attributes.name: [Cassandra OTel] High error rate by node

esqlQuery.esql:
TS metrics-cassandra.otel-default
// Combine request count and error count per node via FORK
| FORK (
    WHERE cassandra.client.request.count IS NOT NULL
    | STATS requests = SUM(INCREASE(cassandra.client.request.count)) BY server.address
    | EVAL errors = 0.0
  )
  (
    WHERE cassandra.client.request.error.count IS NOT NULL
    | STATS errors = SUM(INCREASE(cassandra.client.request.error.count)) BY server.address
    | EVAL requests = 0.0
  )
| STATS total_requests = SUM(requests), total_errors = SUM(errors) BY server.address
// Minimum sample size to avoid noisy low-traffic nodes
| WHERE total_requests > 10
| EVAL error_rate_pct = ROUND(total_errors / total_requests * 100.0, 2)
// Threshold: 5% error rate; tune for your tolerance
| WHERE error_rate_pct > 5.0
| SORT error_rate_pct DESC
